source_section.title_label_raw: General Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors

sections.title_label_raw: Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors General Requirements: View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors General Requirements: View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: A development shall not protrude into a view plane, a Halifax Citadel rampart sight line, or a waterfront view corridor.

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors General Requirements: View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: An application for a development that could potentially protrude into, abut, or be subject to:

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors General Requirements: View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: a view plane, as shown on Schedules 26 and 28;

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors General Requirements: View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: a Halifax Citadel rampart sight line, as shown on Schedule 27A; or

provisions.heading_context_raw: Requirements for View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors General Requirements: View Planes, Halifax Citadel Rampart Sight Lines, and Waterfront View Corridors
provisions.text: a waterfront view corridor, as shown on Schedules 29 to 47; shall include plans, certified by a surveyor, to demonstrate that the development will not protrude into a required view plane, a Halifax Citadel rampart sight line, or a waterfront view corridor.
